kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

test.name: ลบบัญชีแบบเลือกประวัติส่วนตัว

kw.name: ไปหน้า สมัครสมาชิก
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: สมัครสมาชิก
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Generate Random String
kw.doc: Generates a string with a desired ``length`` from the given ``chars``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: ข้อมูลส่วนตัว
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: ยืนยันตัวตน
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: กรอกข้อมูลยืนยันตัวตน
Generate Random String
kw.doc: Generates a string with a desired ``length`` from the given ``chars``.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[contains(text(),"สมัครสมาชิก")]'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[contains(text(),"เข้าสู่ระบบ")]'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Does Not Contain
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL does not contains ``location``.

kw.name: ไปหน้าโปรไฟล์ผู้ใช้
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: การลบบัญชีผู้ใช้
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: เลือกประวัติส่วนตัว
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//span[contains(text(),"ประวัติส่วนตัว")]/preceding-sibling::input
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//span[contains(text(),"ประวัติส่วนตัว")]/preceding-sibling::input'.
kw.arg: xpath=//span[contains(text(),"ประวัติส่วนตัว")]/preceding-sibling::input
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: กรอกข้อมูลยืนยันการลบ
Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//span[contains(text(),"รับทราบข้อตกลง")]/preceding-sibling::input'.
kw.arg: xpath=//span[contains(text(),"รับทราบข้อตกลง")]/preceding-sibling::input
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'ยืนยัน' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder="พิมพ์คำว่า ยืนยัน"]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//input[@placeholder="พิมพ์คำว่า ยืนยัน"]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: ยืนยันลบบัญชี
Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(text(),"ยืนยันการลบข้อมูล")]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[contains(text(),"ยืนยันการลบข้อมูล")]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(text(),"ยืนยันการลบข้อมูล")]
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: ต้องเห็น popup ลบสำเร็จ
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: ลบบัญชีสำเร็จ
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: กดปุ่มตกลงใน popup
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: ต้องเด้งไปหน้า Home
Wait Until Location Is
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL is ``expected``.

Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//span[contains(text(),"ประวัติการสร้างเส้นทางและข้อมูลรถยนต์ (กรณีเป็นผู้ขับขี่)")]/preceding-sibling::input

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//span[contains(text(),"ประวัติการสร้างเส้นทางและข้อมูลรถยนต์ (กรณีเป็นผู้ขับขี่)")]/preceding-sibling::input'.

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: ต้องเด้งไปหน้า Home
Wait Until Location Is
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL is ``expected``.

test.name: ลบบัญชีแบบเลือกประวัติส่วนตัวและเลือกประวัติการเดินทาง

kw.name: ไปหน้า สมัครสมาชิก
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: สมัครสมาชิก
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Generate Random String
kw.doc: Generates a string with a desired ``length`` from the given ``chars``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: ข้อมูลส่วนตัว
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep

kw.name: Sleep

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: ยืนยันตัวตน
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: กรอกข้อมูลยืนยันตัวตน
Generate Random String
kw.doc: Generates a string with a desired ``length`` from the given ``chars``.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[contains(text(),"สมัครสมาชิก")]'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[contains(text(),"เข้าสู่ระบบ")]'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Does Not Contain
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL does not contains ``location``.

kw.name: ไปหน้าโปรไฟล์ผู้ใช้
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: การลบบัญชีผู้ใช้
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: เลือกประวัติส่วนตัว
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//span[contains(text(),"ประวัติส่วนตัว")]/preceding-sibling::input
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//span[contains(text(),"ประวัติส่วนตัว")]/preceding-sibling::input'.
kw.arg: xpath=//span[contains(text(),"ประวัติส่วนตัว")]/preceding-sibling::input
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: เลือกประวัติการเดินทาง
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//span[contains(text(),"ประวัติการเดินทาง")]/preceding-sibling::input
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//span[contains(text(),"ประวัติการเดินทาง")]/preceding-sibling::input'.
kw.arg: xpath=//span[contains(text(),"ประวัติการเดินทาง")]/preceding-sibling::input
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: กรอกข้อมูลยืนยันการลบ
Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//span[contains(text(),"รับทราบข้อตกลง")]/preceding-sibling::input'.
kw.arg: xpath=//span[contains(text(),"รับทราบข้อตกลง")]/preceding-sibling::input
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'ยืนยัน' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder="พิมพ์คำว่า ยืนยัน"]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//input[@placeholder="พิมพ์คำว่า ยืนยัน"]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: ยืนยันลบบัญชี
ต้องเห็น popup ลบสำเร็จ
กดปุ่มตกลงใน popup
ต้องเด้งไปหน้า Home

test.name: ลบบัญชีแบบเลือกประวัติส่วนตัวและเลือกประวัติการสร้างเส้นทางและข้อมูลรถยนต์ (กรณีเป็นผู้ขับขี่)
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: ลบบัญชีแบบเลือกประวัติการเดินทางและเลือกประวัติการสร้างเส้นทางและข้อมูลรถยนต์ (กรณีเป็นผู้ขับขี่)
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: ลบบัญชีแบบเลือกทั้ง 3 แบบ
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.
